title: stelis navicularis
intro: Stelis navicularis, also known as the "Navicular Stelis," is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and nausea. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving circulation, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and alkaloids. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
